positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. Focus on silhouetted ancient trees with glowing, bioluminescent leaves and branches. The sky is a deep indigo gradient transitioning to soft lavender, filled with abstract constellations and gentle cosmic dust trails. Central composition with a single, glowing crystal structure at the base of the main tree. Style: Art Deco meets Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e influence). Use strong negative space, clean lines, limited color palette (indigo, teal, gold, black). High contrast, designed for screen printing on fabric. Flat vector aesthetic, seamless repeat potential.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, duplicate, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photo, realistic, 3d render, bokeh
